summary: Tested Content List active/passive state + Core Template Pack features (#612/P1). All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/admin/layouts/{id}/active response structure has is_active nested inside 'item' object - consistent with other layout endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features for #612 + P1 working. verify-standard-pack returns total_rows=12 for core scope (3 countries * 4 templates). install-standard-pack returns controlled JSON with template_scope='core'. Frontend active_state column shows green/red dots with Aktif Et/Pasif Et actions.

backend_get_layouts_is_active.details: is_active field present in all list items as boolean

backend_patch_active_toggle.details: Toggle between active/passive states works, response contains updated is_active in item object

backend_patch_active_on_deleted_returns_.details: Returns 400 when trying to toggle active state on deleted revision

backend_verify_standard_pack_core_scope.details: With TR,DE,FR and include_extended_templates=false, returns total_rows=12 (3 countries * 4 core templates) and template_scope='core'

backend_verify_standard_pack_extended_sc.details: With include_extended_templates=true, returns total_rows=45 (3 countries * 15 templates) and template_scope='extended'

backend_install_standard_pack_core_respo.details: Returns 200 with controlled JSON response containing template_scope='core', summary, results, failed_countries

backend_verify_returns_items_array.details: Returns items array with 4 items for single country core scope

frontend_active_state_column.details: active_state column header visible in table

frontend_green_dots_aktif.details: Green dots (bg-emerald-500) shown for active items - 111 found

frontend_red_dots_pasif.details: Red dots (bg-rose-500) shown for passive items - 2 found

frontend_pasif_et_buttons.details: Pasif Et buttons visible and functional - 112 found, action completes successfully

frontend_template_pack_panel.details: #612 + P1 Başlangıç: Standart Template Pack panel visible with all form fields

frontend_publish_dogrula_button.details: Publish Doğrula button visible and functional, returns scope: core · ready_rows: 12 / total_rows: 12 · ready_ratio: 100%

frontend_tek_tik_kurulum_button.details: Tek Tık Kurulum Başlat button visible

frontend_extended_templates_checkbox.details: Genişletilmiş şablonlar (core dışı) checkbox visible, unchecked by default
